message:
fix(security): rate limiting, CSP/HSTS headers, body limits, analytics origin (#7028-#7040) (#7068)

* fix(server): trusted proxies, rate limiting, security headers, body limits

- Configure Fiber TrustedProxies with RFC-1918 CIDRs so c.IP() returns
  the real client IP behind Kubernetes ingress (#7028)
- Add publicLimiter (60 req/min) to all unauthenticated endpoints:
  active-users, nightly-e2e, analytics, ping, youtube, medium (#7029)
- Add analyticsBodyGuard (64 KB) to analytics proxy POST routes (#7030)
- Add Content-Security-Policy header with restrictive default-src (#7037)
- Add Strict-Transport-Security header on HTTPS responses (#7038)
- Document in-memory rate limiter multi-pod limitation (#7033)
- Add Retry-After header to all 429 responses (#7040)
- Move body-size constants to package level; document that Fiber global
  BodyLimit remains at 20 MB for feedback uploads while bodyGuard
  enforces 1 MB on other routes (#7039)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(analytics): origin-only validation, restrict Netlify wildcard

- Remove Referer header fallback from isAllowedOrigin — only the Origin
  header is checked for security decisions (#7031)
- Restrict *.netlify.app wildcard to kubestellar-console.netlify.app and
  deploy-preview-*--kubestellar-console.netlify.app (#7032)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(github-proxy): per-user rate limiting, response size cap

- Replace global githubProxyLimiter with per-user rate limiting keyed on
  JWT user ID so one user cannot DoS all others (#7034)
- Wrap io.ReadAll with io.LimitReader(maxGitHubResponseBytes=10MB) to
  prevent memory exhaustion from large GitHub API responses (#7035)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
